rationale: In the citing paper, Sun, Neslin, and Srinivasan (2003) is cited only in grouped parenthetical references when the authors compare the magnitude of their estimated elasticities to prior brand-choice studies. The citation functions as a benchmark/background example, not as a basis for theory development, hypothesis construction, model specification, or interpretation of a specific mechanism in this paper. There is no distinct discussion of the forward-looking promotion model or direct methodological borrowing from the cited work.
